Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula

Class SignedFormula<T extends LiteralDescriptor>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.SignedFormula<T>
public class SignedFormula<T extends LiteralDescriptor> extends Object
This represents a signed formula. It does not have an index list.
